case_title: STILES DORI C/O 21ST CENTURY LEARNING VS LEHN-HERR VELMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,146.50 FILED BY STILES DORI C/O 21ST CENTURY LEARNING AS TO DEFENDANT LEHN-HERR VELMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEHN-HERR VELMA
